params.name: iF Design Award
params.description: This award aims to recognize outstanding works in product design, communication design, and packaging design, symbolizing design quality and representing innovation and functionality. The award's evaluation process is extremely rigorous, with a jury composed of internationally renowned design experts, evaluating entries from multiple dimensions. In recent years, the award has emphasized design sustainability, encouraging designers to consider environmental protection and social responsibility wh …
